forecast.name: Overnight
forecast.detailedForecast: Patchy fog. Mostly cloudy, with a low around 51. South wind around 6 mph.

forecast.name: Sunday
forecast.detailedForecast: Patchy fog before 9am, then a slight chance of rain showers. Mostly cloudy, with a high near 75. Southwest wind 6 to 10 mph. Chance of precipitation is 20%.

weather_report:
In the quiet hours before dawn, Boston lies shrouded in a delicate veil of patchy fog. The clouds above mirror the serenity of the streets below, where the familiar hum of city life seems momentarily hushed. As the morning unfolds, this fog is expected to lift gently, giving way to an overcast sky that offers a hint of warmth, with temperatures reaching up to a comfortable 75 degrees later in the day. A soft breeze drifts from the southwest, whispers of summer teasing the coolness of the overnight air.

As you prepare to greet the day, consider dressing in layers—a light sweater or cardigan will serve you well against the lingering chill of the morning, while a short-sleeved shirt may be all you need come afternoon. Today's slate invites a leisurely exploration: perhaps a meandering stroll along the Charles River, where the water reflects the subdued hues of a cloudy sky, or a gentle visit to a local café, where the warmth of freshly brewed coffee complements the quiet ambiance outside. With a slight chance of rain on the horizon, it may be wise to carry an umbrella, just in case. While it may be an ordinary day, the soft light and gentle breeze remind us that even the most mundane moments can hold a kind of understated beauty.
